The Founder's Story

From Low-T At 25 To Unstoppable

ATHANASE™ wasn't born in a boardroom. It was born from a blood test that scared the hell out of Saj — the founder of SALIENTS® — and the four-year journey that followed.

The Wake-Up CallAt 25, Saj was diagnosed with low testosterone. His doctor recommended TRT for life. He refused.
Rock BottomTotal T at 9.56 nmol/L. Free T at 0.236. Chronic fatigue, fat gain, no drive, no confidence.
4 Years Of InconsistencyHacks and shortcuts didn't move the needle. By May 2023, levels were back at 9.25 nmol/L.
The Turning PointHe built ATHANASE® and committed to a disciplined, multi-faceted protocol. Everything changed.
